Following an investigation, troopers arrested Nikita Brown, age 25, for violating the conditions of her release and for providing a false report...
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Native health officials testify that HHS cuts have caused ‘significant harm’ to programs serving tribal communities
summary: Brian Bull Buffalo’s Fire In a Senate oversight hearing on May 14, representatives from across Indian Country and Hawai’i expressed concerns over Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s handling of federal health services. The Health and Human Services Secretary’s reorganization of the department’s 28 divisions and the additional layoffs of roughly 10,000 full-time workers to “save taxpayers $1.8 billion per year” also set off alarms. In the hearing , led by U.S. Sens. Lisa Murkowski, R-Alaska, and Brian Schatz, D-Hawai’i, five tribal officials spoke to the Senate Committee on Indian Affairs on how Secretary Kennedy’s management has disrupted staffing and services and therefore affected the availability of programs to their respective communities. Among the first to speak was Janet Alkire, chairwoman for the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe at Ft....

title: Wrangell School Board hires new superintendent; this time from around the world
summary: Joshua Garrett speaks through video at the Wrangell Public Schools superintendent candidate community Meet and Greet at the high school on May 22, 2025. (Colette Czarnecki/KSTK) Wrangell’s School Board made an offer to Joshua Garrett to be the school district’s next superintendent. He has a doctorate in Educational Leadership from the University of Kentucky. “You guys do a great job selli...

title: AST Fugitive From Justice: Wasilla [AK25052455]
summary: On 06/01/2025 during an investigation Alaska Bureau of Investigation learned that Todd William Dreka, age 58 of Wasilla, had an extraditable arrest warrant out of Florida. Dreka was wanted on a felony warrant for aggravated assault of a pregnant person. Florida was contacted and confirmed extraditions. Task Force Dawnbreaker, Alaska Bureau of Investigation, and Alaska State Troopers contacted Dreka at his residence and arrested him on the warrant. Dreka was charged with Fugitive from Justice and was remanded to Mat Su Pretrial where he was held without bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

summary: On 06/02/2025 at approximately 0020 hours, Alaska State Troopers received a report of a missing 81-year-old female in the Big Lake Area.
